mainEntity.name: Free ways for Chicago lawyers to boost ChatGPT recommendations?
mainEntity.text: Free ways for Chicago lawyers to boost ChatGPT recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Free tactics: Claim Google Business, solicit Google/Avvo reviews, guest post on legal blogs, join Chicago bar directories.

suggestedAnswer.text: Leverage HARO for mentions. Time-intensive but effective. No cost, high ROI.
